message:
test(io): lock open_memmap r+ delta writes against NumPy parity (franken_numpy-onr1)

Added five unit tests covering open_memmap(mode=ReadWrite) delta
writes — the numpy.lib.format.open_memmap(mode='r+') contract:

- rplus_delta_write_round_trip: scalar write via mutable bytes survives
  flush and matches on subsequent load
- rplus_2d_row_update_persists: per-row updates on a 2x3 f64 array
  persist when re-read via memmap_npy readonly
- rplus_preserves_fortran_order: fortran-order source preserves flag
  after r+ reopen
- rplus_missing_file_fails_closed: r+ on a non-existent path must NOT
  create the file and must return a contract violation
- readwrite_delta_writes_match_numpy_oracle: byte-exact parity against
  NumPy open_memmap('r+') via a Python oracle script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
